steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a Words in Context question. The blank is parallel to "illuminate the Pleistocene epoch" and "revealing important details" — the fossil lets scientists perceive or figure out evolutionary steps, not produce or rank them.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — yield: "yield" means produce or generate. Paleoanthropologists do not produce evolutionary steps; they identify steps that already occurred. ✗
  • Choice B — discern: "discern" means to perceive or distinguish clearly. The fossil remains help scientists make out what those evolutionary steps were — exactly parallel to "illuminate" and "reveal." ✓
  • Choice C — prioritize: "prioritize" means rank by importance. The passage is about identifying evolutionary steps, not deciding which steps matter more than others. ✗
  • Choice D — exploit: "exploit" means take advantage of. Researchers study evolutionary steps; they do not exploit them. ✗
B is correct.
